ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "content_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each document's content */,
  "template_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the document template */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "protection_type" TEXT /* Type of protection applied to the document */,
  "protection_label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the document for protection classification */,
  "protection_policy" TEXT /* Policy applied to the document for protection */,
  "protection_status" TEXT /* Current protection status of the document */,
  "protection_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the protection policy for the document */,
  "protection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document protection was last modified */,
  "process_version" TEXT /* Version of the process applied to the document */,
  "aad_tenant_id" TEXT /* Azure Active Directory Tenant ID associated with the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_aad_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("aad_tenant_id") REFERENCES aad_tenants ("aad_tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES document_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_templates" (
  "template_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each document template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the document template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the document template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the corporation */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation performed on the document */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the operation */,
  "operation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the operation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the document */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the client accessing the document */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the operation */,
  "workload" TEXT /* Workload context of the operation */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used to access the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_workload FOREIGN KEY ("workload") REFERENCES workloads ("workload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES documents ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protection_types" (
  "protection_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protection type */,
  "protection_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the protection type */,
  "protection_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the protection type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protection_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_versions" (
  "process_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process version */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the process version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "platform_version" TEXT /* Version of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workloads" (
  "workload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workload */,
  "workload_name" TEXT /* Name of the workload */,
  "workload_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the workload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label assigned to a document */,
  "label_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aad_tenants" (
  "aad_tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each AAD tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "tenant_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aad_tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group membership */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document access log entry */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the document access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES documents ("content_id")
)
